About

A journalism background with a marketing mindset.

I am a Journalism student at National Chengchi University with a minor in Law, and a background that combines storytelling, social observation, and strategic thinking.

I currently contribute to University News through feature reporting, interviewing, and news writing. Beyond journalism, I enjoy translating cultural and consumer observations into marketing-relevant insights.

This portfolio highlights my experience across content creation, social media, brand collaboration, and consumer-oriented strategy.

Projects

Selected work.

Marketing Strategy

2nd STREET Advertising Strategy Proposal

A consumer-focused marketing strategy project designed to reposition the brand for Gen Z audiences through more relatable and socially engaging communication.

Key Insight: Potential customers may hesitate to enter the store because they perceive the brand as expensive and limited in style.

Strategy: Reframed the brand through storytelling, short-form social content, and interactive campaign ideas built around the treasure-hunting shopping experience.

My Contribution: Synthesized key findings and helped shape the strategic direction of the proposal.
